director_intent: Express bodily release and product sensoriality through restrained associative montage.

production_spec.copy_policy: Preserve supplied exact copy; keep provisional non-claim copy explicitly provisional.

lens_and_scale_tendencies: alternate environmental wides with tactile macro inserts
camera_movement_principles: one calm motivated movement per shot
cutting_motivations: match gesture, texture or directional energy
performance_restraint: no advertising smile; emotion appears through breath and posture
product_reveal_strategy: progress from source world to tactile material to packshot
motion_rhythm: release expands; tactile inserts slow; packshot settles

global_directing_prompt_full: GLOBAL DIRECTING GRAMMAR — alternate environmental wides with tactile macro inserts; one calm motivated movement per shot; keep product-readable negative space; match gesture, texture or directional energy; no advertising smile; emotion appears through breath and posture; progress from source world to tactile material to packshot; release expands; tactile inserts slow; packshot settles; restrained performance; motivated cuts; one primary camera movement.

shots.narrative_function: Move from anticipation into bodily release.
shots.advertising_function: Associate the product world with tactile calm.
shots.scene: architectural glass atrium at late afternoon
shots.ending_state: body axis open, eyes softly closed
shots.lens_intent: portrait compression without flattening shoulder movement
shots.composition: face upper-left, open field to movement side
shots.focus_behavior: hold eyes and eyelashes, allow background softness
shots.blocking: subject remains planted while torso opens toward light
shots.continuity_in: conceptual continuation from prior natural texture
shots.continuity_out: raised chin motivates next skin-highlight macro
shots.visible_emotional_expression: relief appears through softened jaw, released shoulders and slower breath

on_screen_copy.timing_intent: enter after the visible action resolves

keyframe_requirement_map.reason: performance and skin highlight need a generation-ready anchor

previs_requirement_map.reason: breath and push-in timing should align

inferred_directing_decisions.decision: externalize relief through breath, shoulders and jaw
inferred_directing_decisions.rationale: the source states a felt experience rather than a literal product procedure
inferred_directing_decisions.source_basis: source creative intent plus conservative directing inference
